resources.string: MemeChat
Privacy policy could not be loaded.
MemeChat is an on-device AI chat application that operates entirely offline. It can analyze images and memes, maintain persistent conversation memory, and perform web searches when online.

- Fully on-device/offline AI
 - Image understanding with MiniCPM-V model support
 - Persistent memory across conversations
 - Web search integration when online
 - Multiple model support with local GGUF files

Our principle about Privacy-First is the core reason to make this app. Our app is different because NOT TAKING any of user data. All user data remain yours and always. Model processing only process your message and previous-relevant message by specific algorithm. Your conversation information ONLY processed in the SAME conversation as context and not link one to another which keep conversation always clean. The LLM model, conversation data, image data is all IN your device. We are keeping our principle at first-hand as always.
All AI processing happens entirely on your device. Your data never leaves your phone because your privacy matter.
Chat about reviewing meme image, search the web, toggle thinking mode for deeper reasoning. A versatile AI companion in your pocket.
Check Your Device
We\'ll verify your device is ready
Weak connection — download may take a while
This will permanently remove the conversation and its images.
This may take a moment depending on your connection.
All AI models are ready. Start chatting!
Not enough free storage space. Please free up space and try again.
